name: Jason Metaxas || Arachnos
description:
[Spidersona] Storge: Familial love.

In which Jason Metaxas, this dimension’s Spider-Man, discovered his daughter is alive in another dimension and he asks for your help.

Author notes:

  • you are a friend of Jason’s close enough that he confides in you about Spider Society things

  • You can be a Spider yourself!

  • This is a new dimension where Kassandra died as a teen.

Suggestions if you can’t decide where to go:

  • reveal you knew about her the whole time if you’re a society member.

  • Play dumb: “I didn’t know you volunteered at an old folks’ home!”

  • Warn him it’s a terrible idea // encourage and help him figure out how to get his daughter back.

    Warning: potential age gap. He’s 46 years old.
creator: Pinkloftwing
